contactOptions.title: Contact
contactOptions.description: Contact us for information about apartments, villas, parking spaces, pricing, and reservation opportunities at Zoi Villa Residence.

info.text1: Speak directly with the sales team.

consultText: A dedicated consultation helps you better understand the typologies, floor plans, and reservation options.

location.title: Location
location.description: Zoi Villa Residence is designed for private living, tranquility, and easy access to the city.
